name: Praline Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition for 3 minutes total.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, baking soda, and baking powder.
4. Mix sour cream, cream cheese, and liqueur in another separate bowl until combined.
5. Alternately add the dry ingredient mixture and the sour cream mixture to the butter mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in the chopped pecans.
7. Grease a bundt pan with butter and sprinkle with flour.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 60-70 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
10. Cool in the pan on a rack for 15 minutes before turning out onto a large plate.
11. Make the glaze by combining butter, brown sugar, liqueur, and water in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly for 5 minutes until thickened.
12. Pour the glaze over the cooled cake and allow it to drip before serving.
